product_overview: Enjaz is a responsive web platform to manage sample receptions and issue radiation safety/compliance certificates, replacing a legacy WPF workflow with real-time dashboards and exportable reports.
core_goals: Record and track sample receptions with full metadata (analysis request, notification, declaration, supplier, sender, origin).
Issue certificates that are explicitly linked to valid reception records so no certificate is orphaned.
Provide operational visibility via dashboard charts and counters to monitor samples and certificates over time.
Generate downloadable reports and exports (PDF/Excel) for compliance and archival purposes.

features.name: Dashboard Statistics
features.description: Provide at-a-glance counters and visual trend charts for samples and certificates plus quick actions to start common tasks.
user_flows: / -> View monthly charts for samples and certificates -> Observe high-level counters for total samples and today's arrivals
/ -> Activate Quick Search to navigate to /samples -> Land on samples view with search focused on recent receptions
/ -> Trigger Issue Certificate quick action to open the reception search modal on the certificates workflow -> Search for a reception record and proceed to issuance

features.name: Sample Reception Management
features.description: Capture and manage incoming sample receptions, maintain a pageable grid of reception records, and show certificate linkage status.
user_flows: /samples -> Start a new reception entry -> Fill required reception fields (analysis request #, notification #, declaration #, supplier, sender, origin) -> Submit reception -> See the new reception listed in the grid with status
/samples -> Add multiple reception entries in sequence -> See all new receptions appended to the grid
/samples -> Start a new reception entry -> Submit with a required field left empty -> See a validation error indicating the missing required field

features.name: Certificate Issuance
features.description: Create certificates linked to reception records, support bulk sample counts per certificate, and produce printable PDF output.
user_flows: /certificates -> Trigger New Certificate action to open reception search modal -> Search for a specific reception record -> Select a reception record to link -> Fill certificate details -> Submit certificate issuance -> See issued certificate listed

/certificates -> Trigger New Certificate action to open reception search modal -> Search and select multiple receptions within limits -> Fill certificate details for grouped receptions -> Submit certificate issuance -> Download or print generated PDF

/certificates -> Trigger New Certificate action to open reception search modal -> Attempt to submit issuance without selecting a reception -> See a validation error stating a reception must be linked before issuing

features.name: Reporting & Exports
features.description: Generate and download PDF and Excel reports filtered by date or entity, with export rules that hide redundant charts when scoped to a single entity.
user_flows: /reports -> Select report type and date range -> Generate PDF export -> Download PDF
/reports -> Select report type and date range -> Generate Excel export -> Download Excel
/reports -> Apply a filter scoped to a single entity -> Generate PDF export -> Download PDF with conditional charts removed for the scoped entity

routes.description: System dashboard with statistics and quick actions

features.name: Dashboard Statistics
user_interactions: Click "Issue Certificate" quick action to open search modal
Click "Quick Search" to navigate to samples with search focus

features.name: Certificate Generation
features.description: Link reception records to new certificates
user_interactions: Search for a specific reception record in the modal
Fill certificate details and click issue
